targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Sessions" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS "Visitors" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Pageviews" FROM page_views WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT ROUND(AVG(page_load_time_ms)) AS "Avg ms" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE AND page_load_time_ms > 0

WITH today AS (SELECT visitor_id, COUNT(*) AS sc FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY visitor_id) SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sc > 1) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "Returning %" FROM today
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS "Active" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE last_activity_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT stat_date AS time, total_sessions AS "Sessions", unique_visitors AS "Unique Visitors" FROM visitor_daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date) ORDER BY stat_date
SELECT stat_date AS time, total_pageviews AS "Pageviews" FROM visitor_daily_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(stat_date) ORDER BY stat_date
SELECT path AS "Page", COUNT(*) AS "Views", ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)) AS "Avg Duration (ms)" FROM page_views WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY path ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COALESCE(browser_name, 'Unknown') AS "Browser", COUNT(*) AS "Sessions" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY browser_name ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(device_type, 'Unknown') AS "Device", COUNT(*) AS "Sessions" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT to_char(created_at, 'Dy') AS "Day", EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at)::int AS "Hour", COUNT(*) AS "Sessions" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY CASE to_char(created_at, 'Dy') WHEN 'Mon' THEN 1 WHEN 'Tue' THEN 2 WHEN 'Wed' THEN 3 WHEN 'Thu' THEN 4 WHEN 'Fri' THEN 5 WHEN 'Sat' THEN 6 WHEN 'Sun' THEN 7 END, 2
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(referrer, ''), 'Direct') AS "Referrer", COUNT(*) AS "Sessions" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY referrer ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT COALESCE(os_name, 'Unknown') AS "OS", COUNT(*) AS "Sessions" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY os_name ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10
